series_metadata.series_description: Office of Collective Bargaining Seniority lists, Director''s correspondence. Bumping Rights, Justification for Developmental Center closings and other related correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for five years then provide to state archives for review prior to destruction. ; Electronic: Retain for five years then provide to state archives for review prior to destruction, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
